home.title: Sébastien RUET
home.subtitle: French student in computer science at IUT2 of Grenoble

about.title: À propos
about.text:
My name is Sébastien RUET and I'm a student in the second year of a computer science degree at the IUT2 in Grenoble. During my studies, I had the opportunity to develop my skills and to apply them in a team context as well as in a solo work context.

I am passionate about computers and new technologies. I am also a big fan of video games, music, photography and video.
I have the B license. I have been practicing aikdio since 2014, but I have also been running since 2019.
I have also volunteered at several live performance festivals and have been able to develop my teamwork skills during these opportunities.
